headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Marathon Petroleum, Raises Price Target to $265
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Joe Laetsch   maintains Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $233 to $265.
